name: panda-stage
description: A beginner-friendly desktop editor for short 2D cutout animations.

scripts.dev: pnpm build:electron && concurrently --kill-others --success first "pnpm dev:renderer" "pnpm dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently --kill-others "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron dist-electron/main/index.js"
scripts.build: pnpm typecheck && pnpm build:renderer && pnpm build:electron
